results.notes: Verified as Aker Solutions ASA on Oslo. Investing shows the quote-page ticker as AKSOA, while on-page coverage references OL:AKSO.
Verified via the market selector on https://de.investing.com/equities/ssab-ab, where the Stockholm listing appears as SSABb and resolves to this venue-specific quote URL.
Verified as Aurubis AG on Xetra. Investing uses 676650/NAFG for the Xetra quote page; NDA on the same page refers to the Zurich listing, so the request symbol does not match Investing's Xetra ticker.
Verified as AcadeMedia AB on Stockholm. Investing uses ACADE as the quote-page ticker for this listing.
